Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it provides quality tertiary education (T4.3). It also fosters critical thinking, advanced research, and appreciation of cultural diversity (T4.7).
evidence: 建立詞體知識 (establish knowledge of the Ci form)
培養思辨與進階研究之能力 (cultivate the ability for critical thinking and advanced research)

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course studies 'Tz'u,' a literary form described as a 'major breakthrough in Chinese literary history,' directly contributing to safeguarding cultural heritage (T11.4).
evidence: 詞體的形成和流行，堪稱中國文學史上的重大突破之一 (The formation and popularity of the Ci form can be called one of the major breakthroughs in Chinese literary history.)
